title: ODS-E Energy Timeseries
description: Standardized energy reading from IoT devices, supporting generation, consumption, and net metering

kWh.description: Active energy in kilowatt-hours. Must be >= 0 for generation and consumption; may be negative for net direction.

error_code.description: Original OEM error code (preserved for reference)

kVArh.description: Reactive energy in kilovolt-ampere reactive hours

direction.description: Energy flow direction. Defaults to 'generation' for backward compatibility.

end_use.description: End-use category aligned with ComStock/ResStock end-use breakdowns

seller_party_id.description: Canonical seller identifier in authority:type:id format.

buyer_party_id.description: Canonical buyer identifier in authority:type:id format.

network_operator_id.description: Canonical network operator identifier in authority:type:id format.

wheeling_agent_id.description: Canonical wheeling/intermediary identifier in authority:type:id format.

settlement_period_start.description: Settlement period start in ISO 8601 format.

settlement_period_end.description: Settlement period end in ISO 8601 format.

loss_factor.description: Applied loss factor for settlement (for example 0.03 for 3%).

contract_reference.description: Contract or schedule reference (PPA, bilateral deal, or wheeling schedule).

tariff_schedule_id.description: Canonical tariff schedule identifier in authority:municipality:code:vN format.

tariff_period.description: Tariff period classification for the interval.

tariff_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for tariff components.

tariff_version_effective_at.description: Timestamp when the tariff version became effective.

energy_charge_component.description: Energy charge amount applied to this interval.

network_charge_component.description: Network charge amount applied to this interval.

injection_point_id.description: Grid injection point identifier for the wheeling path.

offtake_point_id.description: Grid offtake point identifier for the wheeling path.

wheeling_status.description: Reconciliation status of this wheeling record.

wheeling_path_id.description: Reference to a registered wheeling path or schedule.

generation_charge_component.description: Unbundled generation charge for this interval.

transmission_charge_component.description: Transmission use-of-system charge for this interval.

distribution_charge_component.description: Distribution network charge for this interval.

ancillary_service_charge_component.description: Ancillary services levy for this interval.

non_bypassable_charge_component.description: Non-bypassable charges for this interval (cross-subsidies, FBE contributions).

environmental_levy_component.description: Environmental or carbon levy for this interval.

curtailment_flag.description: Whether generation was curtailed during this interval.

curtailed_kWh.description: Estimated generation lost to curtailment during this interval.

curtailment_instruction_id.description: Reference to the system operator dispatch instruction.

balance_responsible_party_id.description: BRP assigned for this connection point and interval.

forecast_kWh.description: Nominated or scheduled volume for this interval.

imbalance_kWh.description: Difference between forecast and actual (positive = over-delivery, negative = under-delivery).

billing_period.description: Billing cycle reference (e.g., 2026-02 for monthly, 2026-W07 for weekly).

billed_kWh.description: Billed quantity for this interval (may differ from metered kWh).

billing_status.description: Data quality or origin of the billed quantity.

daa_reference.description: Distribution Agency Agreement reference if under a DAA with Eskom Distribution.

renewable_attribute_id.description: Certificate or credit identifier (e.g., I-REC tracking number).

certificate_standard.description: Certificate scheme under which the renewable attribute is issued.

verification_status.description: Lifecycle status of the renewable attribute.

carbon_intensity_gCO2_per_kWh.description: Carbon intensity of the generation source in grams CO2e per kWh.
